GLOBEMAP.SettingTileStyleHint: Use preset name 'golarion' (bundled Golarion map, default) or 'earth' (MapLibre demo Earth tiles), or paste any MapLibre style.json URL to use a custom map.
GLOBEMAP.SettingTileDataBaseHint: Base URL for the Golarion map data (golarion.pmtiles + terrain). Defaults to the shared CDN so the map works without hosting the 305MB file on this server. Leave blank to serve it from this Foundry server (Data/modules/globe-map). Switch to your CDN domain once its DNS is live.
GLOBEMAP.SettingInitialCenterHint: Comma-separated longitude,latitude for the map's default center. Example: 0,20
GLOBEMAP.SettingInitialZoomHint: Zoom level the map opens at.
GLOBEMAP.SettingDefaultProjectionHint: How the map first appears. Globe is a 3D sphere; Flat is a classic flat map (required for the Kingmaker hex overlay). Each user's last choice is remembered.
GLOBEMAP.SettingAnimationsHint: Personal setting. Turn off to disable pin drops, pulses, and ping ripples (reduced motion).
GLOBEMAP.SettingControlEnabledHint: Global default: show the Globe Map button in the scene controls toolbar.
GLOBEMAP.SettingControlIconHint: Global default FontAwesome class for the toolbar button, e.g. 'fa-solid fa-earth-americas'.
GLOBEMAP.SettingGroupEnabledHint: Global: group the button under a shared 'Campaign Tools' control category instead of giving it its own top-level category.
GLOBEMAP.SettingGroupNameHint: Global label for the shared control category the button lives in.
GLOBEMAP.SettingGroupIconHint: Global FontAwesome class for the shared control category, e.g. 'fa-solid fa-toolbox'.
GLOBEMAP.SettingPersonalOverrideHint: Personal: when enabled, your own button/folder settings below override the global ones for you only.
GLOBEMAP.SettingControlEnabledPHint: Personal: show the button for me (only used when personal override is on).
GLOBEMAP.SettingControlIconPHint: Personal FontAwesome class; leave blank to use the global icon.
GLOBEMAP.SettingGroupNamePHint: Personal folder label; leave blank to use the global name.
GLOBEMAP.SettingGroupIconPHint: Personal folder FontAwesome class; leave blank to use the global icon.
GLOBEMAP.SettingPartyIconHint: FontAwesome class used for the party position marker.
GLOBEMAP.SettingDefaultPinIconHint: FontAwesome class new pins start with (can be changed per pin).
GLOBEMAP.SettingDefaultPinColorHint: Color new pins start with, as a hex value like #d4534a.
GLOBEMAP.SettingCreateMacroHint: Adds a script macro to your directory that opens the map, ready to drop on the hotbar.
GLOBEMAP.Tool.AddPin: Add a pin at the map center
GLOBEMAP.Tool.HexFlatOnly: The hex grid is only available in flat view.
GLOBEMAP.PinEditHint: Double-click to edit, drag to move, right-click for options.
GLOBEMAP.Icon.CustomHint: You can paste any FontAwesome class string here.
GLOBEMAP.GMOnly: Only the GM can move pins.
GLOBEMAP.NeedGM: A Game Master must be online to save that change.
GLOBEMAP.MacroExists: The Globe Map macro already exists in your macro directory.
GLOBEMAP.MacroCreated: Created a Globe Map macro. Drag it to your hotbar.
GLOBEMAP.Hex.ConfigHint: A fixed Kingmaker style exploration grid (12-mile hexes) anchored in the world. Only hexes within the visible radius of the party are shown, so the circle slides over the fixed grid as the players travel. Set the radius to 0 to show the whole grid. Use 'Center hex grid here' (right-click) to anchor the whole lattice; grow columns/rows for a larger region.
GLOBEMAP.JT.Title: Party journey
GLOBEMAP.JT.Empty: No waypoints yet. Right-click the map for "Add waypoint here", or hit the + button.
GLOBEMAP.JT.Field.Name: Place name
